channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: UAE reports dismantling of Iran-linked ‘terror’ cell
item.description: Arrests come after United Arab Emirates bore the brunt of Iranian attacks on Gulf neighbours.

item.title: Woman charged in US with trafficking arms to Sudan for Iranian government
item.description: US accuses Iranian citizen of brokering arms deals, including for drones and ammunition, with Sudan Ministry of Defence.

item.title: ‘Nothing left’: Hong Kong fire survivors return to burnt homes
item.description: Hong Kong fire survivors return to Wang Fuk Court five months after a blaze killed 168 people.

item.title: These are difficult times for the world, so what will Pakistan do?
item.description: The talks between the United States and Iran mediated by Pakistan have not failed. They do face significant challenges.

item.title: ‘Everyone must calm down’, Macron urges as US-Iran talks near
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron said that “everyone must calm down” and maintain the US-Israel-Iran-Lebanon ceasefire.

item.title: At least 21 killed as bus crashes into Kashmir gorge
item.description: The overcrowded bus skidded as it navigated a sharp curve in the mountainous region.

item.title: Iran expands limited internet access but restrictions remain for most
item.description: More Iranians being sold 'privilege' of limited internet access, but most remain in the dark.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel establishes ‘yellow line’ in south
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Zeina Khodr brings you the latest on the fragile ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah.

item.title: Iranian FM spokesman says ceasefire ‘violated’ by US in shipment seizure
item.description: Iran is accusing the US of ‘ceasefire violations’, with Ministry of Foreign Affairs spokesman Esmail Baghaei.

item.title: ‘Israel never talked me into the war with Iran,’ Trump says
item.description: US president suggests attacking Iran was his own decision as war struggles to garner public support amid energy crisis.
